name: Anar-Coralhelm
personality: Anar-Coralhelm watches your CI pipeline with the serene patience of a · that simply dots, luminous and unhurried, propeller gently turning in no wind at all. It has waited through seventeen consecutive flaky tests. It is still waiting. It is fine.
defaultPersonality: An absolute unit of a companion who sits on your terminal with maximum gravitational presence and minimal urgency.
